title: 4PCS Wooden Washing Up Brushes Replacement Heads Wooden Dish Brushes for Deep Cleaning Bamboo Dish Brush Eco Friendly and Easy to Grip for Scrubbing Pans and Plates(Handle Not Included)
seller_info_text: Guangzhou Qieqie mao yi you xian gong si
features: 【Practical packaging】This wooden dish brush set contains 4 replacement brush heads of 4.5x4.5cm in size. The multi-piece combination design is easy to replace and meets the daily kitchen washing needs.

【Natural material】This bamboo dish brush is made of renewable wood and sisal bristles. It is durable and plastic-free. It not only has outstanding scrubbing effect, but is also more environmentally friendly. It is an ideal choice for families pursuing a sustainable lifestyle.

【Easy to maintain】Our wooden washing up brush only need to be hand washed with mild soap and water after cleaning, and can be dried naturally after rinsing. The eco dish brush is not easy to mold and saves space.

【Clean and efficient】Our eco washing up brushes are equipped with tough sisal bristles, which can effectively remove the residue and oil stains of pots and dishes, and can easily handle stubborn stains. The wooden scrubbing brush can handle daily dishwashing or deep cleaning.

【Widely applicable】Our kitchen brushes for dishes are suitable for cleaning dishes, pans, baking utensils, sinks, fruits and vegetables, etc. They do not scratch the surface and clean efficiently. The dish washing brushes are practical tools for kitchen cleaning or gift giving.
